mapper.sql: ModelNo, CustomerNo, industry_code, type_ASP, type_PNC, type_S_GROUP, type_S_PRICE, type_S_ROUTE, Auth_95012, desc, is_deleted, created_date, created_user, updated_date, updated_user
mapper.select:
select
distinct
from dbo.product_restrict_temp
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert: insert into dbo.product_restrict_temp (ModelNo, CustomerNo, industry_code, type_ASP, type_PNC, type_S_GROUP, type_S_PRICE, type_S_ROUTE, Auth_95012, desc, is_deleted, created_date, created_user, updated_date, updated_user ) values (#{modelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{customerno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{industryCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{typeAsp,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{typePnc,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{typeSGroup,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{typeSPrice,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{typeSRoute,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{auth95012,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{desc,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{isDeleted,jdbcType=BIT}, #{createdDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createdUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{updatedDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updatedUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
